summary: Backend API Testing Complete - All 20/20 tests PASSED. Tested authentication (login), shifts API, AI characters CMS, safeguarding alerts, callbacks, counsellors, and peer supporters APIs.
critical_code_review_comments: All tested endpoints are working correctly
Authentication requires valid credentials with proper role-based access
Counsellors and peer-supporters endpoints require authentication (403 without token)
AI characters public endpoint correctly excludes prompts for security
Shifts API supports filtering by date range and user
seed_data_creation: Tests create callback records with TEST_ prefix for testing. No cleanup performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. Authentication uses JWT tokens with 24-hour expiration. Counsellors/peer-supporters require auth while AI characters public endpoint does not expose prompts. The static portals (staff-portal, admin-site) are vanilla HTML/JS connecting to the FastAPI backend.

POST /api/auth/login.details: Returns JWT token and user info for valid credentials, 401 for invalid

GET /api/shifts.details: Returns list of shifts, supports date filtering

POST /api/shifts.details: Creates new shift with user association

GET /api/ai-characters.details: Returns 8 characters, excludes prompts, includes source=database

GET /api/safeguarding-alerts.details: Returns list of alerts with risk levels and status

POST /api/callbacks.details: Creates callback and returns id with success message

GET /api/peer-supporters.details: Returns list of peer supporters (requires auth)

database_info.safeguarding_alerts_count: Multiple test alerts exist in database
